scripts.test: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc --outDir .test-dist --rootDir . --module commonjs --target ES2021 --esModuleInterop --moduleResolution node --skipLibCheck --noEmit false lib/__tests__/anthropic.test.ts lib/__tests__/mailer.test.ts lib/__tests__/order-wishes-storyboard.test.ts lib/__tests__/regenerate-slide-cap.test.ts lib/__tests__/uploads.test.ts lib/__tests__/pptx.test.ts lib/__tests__/docx.test.ts lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts && node --test --test-concurrency=1 .test-dist/lib/__tests__/anthropic.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/mailer.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/order-wishes-storyboard.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/regenerate-slide-cap.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/uploads.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/pptx.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/docx.test.js .test-dist/lib/__tests__/auth.test.js && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-dist',{recursive:true,force:true})"
